title: The Ultimate Space Exploration Project - TUSEP
description: This is the perfect space exploration modpack for minecraft.
body:
# The best space exploration modpack for minecraft!

Play either with friends or alone, your space adventure will be amazing!

Make a lot of machinery, craft rockets and discover plenty of celestial bodies.

If you love space, minecraft and exploration, this modpack perfectly suits you.

## WARNING

WHEN USING **OPTIFINE**, MAKE SURE TO RELAUNCH THE GAME AFTER CHANGING CERTAIN SETTINGS OR TEXTURES MAY BREAK! SOME SETTINGS ALSO BREAK SOME TEXTURES EVEN AFTER A RESTART.

## Credits:
Buildcraft : [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buildcraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buildcraft)
